gestures.mdmPrompt: A person smiles and opens arms wide, leaning slightly forward while explaining multiplication clearly and engagingly.
A tutor shifts weight to one side, extending both arms while counting on fingers as they explain the example of bags and oranges.
A tutor points to an imaginary bag, tilting their head slightly while asking how many bags there are, inviting responses.
A person gestures towards an invisible bag with emphasis, asking how many oranges are in it while leaning in slightly.
A tutor stands confidently, displaying both hands outward while clearly stating the total number of oranges, encouraging answers.
A person opens arms wide, smiling, and leans slightly forward to re-explain multiplication in a supportive manner.
A tutor shifts weight to one side again, counting with fingers while explaining the new example of packs and candies enthusiastically.
A tutor points at an imaginary pack with a smile, tilting their head as they ask about the number of packs.
A person gestures towards an imaginary candy pack, leaning forward slightly while inquiring about the number of candies inside.
A tutor stands tall, using both hands to emphasize while inviting responses about the total number of oranges again.
